summary: Frontend responsive design testing completed for Alpha Agency CRM dashboard. All requested features are working correctly: Pipeline page (desktop/mobile), Dashboard Overview, Contacts page, Tasks page, Facturation page, Contact Detail Sheet (Pipedrive style), and mobile navigation with hamburger menu.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All responsive design features are working correctly. The JSX bug in PipelinePage.jsx has been fixed and the application is fully functional.

pipeline_page.desktop_view: PASS - 7 pipeline columns displayed with drag handles, stats cards (Valeur pipeline, Affaires actives, Taux conversion, Valeur moyenne), search bar, horizontal scroll
pipeline_page.mobile_view: PASS - Hamburger menu visible, stats cards stack in 2 columns, pipeline columns scroll horizontally
pipeline_page.horizontal_scroll: PASS - overflow-x-auto class applied, scroll indicator text visible
pipeline_page.drag_handles: PASS - 7 drag handles found for columns

dashboard_overview.desktop_view: PASS - 8 KPI cards in 4-column grid, charts (Évolution des leads, Répartition Pipeline), Statut Factures, Tâches récentes
dashboard_overview.mobile_view: PASS - KPI cards stack in 2-column grid, charts stack vertically, hamburger menu visible
dashboard_overview.kpi_cards: PASS - Contacts (102), Pipeline (15.0k€), Devis en cours (6), CA Facturé (14.0k€), Factures en attente (4), CA Signé (0€), Taux conversion (1.67%), MRR (90€)

contacts_page.desktop_view: PASS - Contact list with 102 contacts, search input, status filter, Import/Nouveau contact buttons
contacts_page.mobile_view: PASS - Responsive contact cards with avatar, name, email, status badges, action buttons

tasks_page.desktop_view: PASS - 3 task columns (À faire, En cours, Terminé), stats cards, search/filter, Kanban board
tasks_page.mobile_view: PASS - Stats cards stack, columns scroll horizontally, hamburger menu visible
tasks_page.task_columns: PASS - 3 columns found with drag handles

facturation_page.desktop_view: PASS - Stats cards (Devis, Factures, Encaissé, À encaisser), Devis/Factures tabs, table with quotes/invoices
facturation_page.mobile_view: PASS - Stats cards stack in 2 columns, table scrolls horizontally
facturation_page.tabs: PASS - Devis (9) and Factures (6) tabs found

contact_detail_sheet.pipedrive_style: PASS - Gradient red header with contact info, status badges, quick action buttons
contact_detail_sheet.desktop_view: PASS - 4 tabs (Profil, Activité, Affaires, Docs), summary stats (Devis, Factures, CA, Tâches), contact info
contact_detail_sheet.mobile_view: PASS - Responsive layout with icon-only buttons, stacked elements

mobile_navigation.sidebar: PASS - Opens on hamburger click with all navigation items
mobile_navigation.overlay: PASS - Dark overlay appears when sidebar is open

mocked_features.social_media_oauth: MOCKED - Facebook/Instagram OAuth buttons present but not connected to real Meta API
